---
name: keydeck-proof
description: |
  Validate KeyDeck proof milestones against explicit acceptance evidence.
  USE FOR: validate KeyDeck proof milestones, verify proof evidence.
  DO NOT USE FOR: generic coding, unrelated architecture brainstorming.
---
# KeyDeck Proof Validator

## Procedure
1. Read the Task Contract.
2. Match each acceptance check to durable evidence.
3. Mark unsupported checks as unproven.
4. Never infer completion from confidence.

## Required output
Report which checks are proven, unproven, failed, or blocked, and cite the durable evidence used.
